name: Pizza with Leeks, Tomato and Goat Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-low heat.
2. Add leeks and sauté until tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in parsley.
4. Spread the leek topping evenly over the Boboli shell.
5. Sprinkle tomatoes over the pizza.
6. Top with cheese and crumbled Montrachet or Feta.
7. Drizzle with 1 tablespoon olive oil.
8. Bake for about 10 minutes at 450°F.
9. Remove from oven and brush crust with olive oil.
